title: ResearchOutcome V1
description: A verified research result produced by applying a ResearchStrategy. Content-addressed via SHA-256 of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON.

outcome_id.description: Content-addressed identifier: SHA-256 hex digest of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON of this object excluding outcome_id itself.

lineage_id.description: Stable identity across revisions (analogous to arXiv paper ID). Generated on first publication, inherited by all subsequent versions within the same research line.

version.description: Version number within the lineage, monotonically increasing. First publication is version 1.

strategy_ref.description: strategy_id of the ResearchStrategy that produced this outcome.

status.description: Verification status. 'verified' means passed RDI gate. 'superseded' means a newer outcome replaced this one.

value.description: The computed value (number, string expression, or array).

unit.description: Unit of measurement. Omit for dimensionless quantities. Interpretation is domain-pack-defined.

metrics.description: Key-value map of research results (physical quantities, derived relations, proven statements, classification results, or other domain-specific outcomes).

artifacts.description: Evidence pointers to computation artifacts (ArtifactRef V1).

integrity_report_ref.description: Content-addressed ID of the IntegrityReport for this outcome.

reproducibility_report_ref.description: Content-addressed ID of the DeviationReport from reproducibility verification.

reproducibility_status.description: Reproducibility verification status. 'verified': independent re-computation agrees. 'pending': verification not yet performed. 'failed': re-computation disagrees. 'not_applicable': outcome type does not support numerical reproducibility (e.g., formal proofs, theoretical arguments).

gate_passed.description: Whether this outcome passed the RDI fail-closed gate.

novelty.description: Novelty score (0-1). Higher means more novel.

generality.description: Methodological generality score (0-1). Broader method applicability = higher.

significance.description: Problem significance score (0-1). How central is the addressed problem to the field.

rank_score.description: Composite ranking score: w_n*novelty + w_g*generality + w_s*significance + w_c*citation_impact.

rdi_scores.description: RDI (Research Desirability Index) scores. Only populated after RDI evaluation.

applicability_range.description: Parameter space where this result is valid.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent/tool that produced this outcome.

run_id.description: Run in which this outcome was produced.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC Z timestamp of creation.

supersedes.description: outcome_id of the previous version this outcome supersedes (if version > 1). Forms the explicit revision chain.

superseded_by.description: outcome_id of the outcome that supersedes this one (if status is 'superseded').
